titleStmt.title: SII 25.14: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 14. (A.R. No. 14 of 1908.) KUMBAKŌṆAM, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the Sūryanārāyaṇa shrine in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple.
This record commences with the praśasti Tiṅgaḷēr-tarut-ten-toṅgal, etc., of the king.
The details of date are Māgha, ba, Wednesday, Āyilya-nakshatra in the year 36.
The king is credited with the titles Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷaṉ and Rājakēsari.

It records the grant of several lands as iṟaiyili by the mūlaparuḍai of Tirukkuḍamukku to the deities Tirukkārōṇam-uḍaiya-mahādēva and Kaṉṉiyāpiḍāri. This iṟaiyili-pramāṇa was executed when the members assembled in the inner precinct (uḷḷāḷai) of the temple of Tirukkīḻkōṭṭamuḍaiyār.

In this record the king is claimed to have destroyed the city of Kalyāṇapura and to have performed the annointment of heroes. The conquests and the titles of king helps us to identify the king with Chōḷa Rājādhirāja I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiṅka
ḷertaru tan toṅkal
veṇkuṭai niḻalkkiḻ ni
la makaḷ nilava malarmakaṭ puṇarntu teṅko
locci kkaruṅkali kaṭintu tantaiyar tamaiyar tampi
yar taṉṟiru maintareṉṟivarai maṇimuṭi cūṭṭikka
ṉṉi kāvalar teṉṉavar muvaruḷ vāṉakam Iruvarukkaruḷi
k kāṉakam Oruvarukkaḷittu porutiṟaṉ ceralaṉ velaike
ḻu kāntaḷūr cālai kalamaṟuppittu Ilaṅkaiyaṟ karaicaiyum
Alaṅkal vallapaṉaiyuṅ kaṉṉakucciyar kāvalaṉaiyum
poṉṉaṉ muṭittalai taṭintu taṉ koṭippaṭaiyai Evi
k kaṉṉāṭakar viṭu kaṭakaripuraḷat taṉṉā� yil tamiḻp paraṇi
koṇ ṭoṉṉur vacci neṭuvāṉ viccayaṉ veruneṉi
t tañciyoṭat taṉ vañciyam paṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ pitā
vai mātā ñ catāmali viṅkunirp pūṇṭur veñ
camattakap paṭuttuppaṭai Āhavamallaṉ payattoṭu
Avar viṭum Oṟṟarai veku t tāṅkavar mār[ pi
l] Āhavamal Iyāṅka mañciṉa neṉṉa naṉkeḻuti
c celutti ttaṉ pulikkoṭippaṭai roṭṭiyār
�ṇavaṉācaik kaṭalpurai ciṟutuṟai peruntuṟai ruppa
ṭu ceṇṭāṭip poru puli virakkoṭiyoṭu tiyāka koṭi Eṭu
t toṉṉavar kavaran toṉnetip piṟakkum Iravalar
tu viravalil Avaṉviṭu taṇṭattukkavaṉ velpuravinuḷa
mpaṉum kāḷitāsaṉum viṉappantārc cāmuṇṭaṉu
pork kommayaṉum villavarājaṉum mutali
ṉar vel camattariyala
ka Avar peru netikavātu
kūrccaraṉ Uppaḷaṉ koy
m malarp pacuntatalai tār nta
milappaṉataṭintu muṉ koṇ
ṭu takai ṉtappai muṉ ṉatappa
appakai cekuttu Uppaḷaṉ vaḻiyil tappi
l pallaraicar nāṅkatu miḻakku māṭṭātu taṉpūṅka
ḻal caraṇeṉap pukuta Araṇavarkkaḷittu ttaṭamuṭi mi
ṭṭukkuṭuttut taṭaṅkaivaṉatappaiyaip paṟittu
ṭaṉ koṭu ponta piṉpaṟaṉ tulain=tañciyum Añcā
tanāy veñcamaṅkaruti viṭavaṉta peṟakkaṭaikaḷ muṉ
peritavaṟkku ṟaivalāran torunāḷ cātti Aṟaikaḻal
pukaḻ pātam muṉpamar piraṭṭaril Oruvaṇaip peṇṇu
ṭai paṭutti Oruvaṉai Añcu cikaippaṭac ciraippittu nerva
ḻi Āhavamalliyum Āhavamallanum Eṉṟu peyar Iṭuvittaṉṟava
ṉ viṭutta ṟ kaṭai taṉnoṭum pokki Uṟakkuṭaṉ viṭṭaṉal
viṭātu ceṉṟaṅ koṭṭiṉar mutukiṭap porutu taṉkaruṭap puli
ttaṇṭiṉmuṉ tānoru tamiya neṟimāṉā kaṭavakarai
k kalliyāṇapurameṉṉun toṉṉakartukaḷeḻat tukaippit
taṉṉakar �ṇacuṟai karumāḷikai poṭiyākki Āṅkatu kākka niṟai
pūṅkaḻal Aṭayirā kuttaṉ mutaliyar kaṭakaḷiṟṟaṇar carora muppat
taiyvar pariyoṭuṅkariyoṭum paṭṭukap porutap poru nakar vijai
rājentṛ te ṉviṅkicai mikavar Abhiṣekañ ceytu cirkeḻu viśva
lokattu viḷaṅku manuneṟi niṉṟaśvametañ ceytaraicu viṟṟirun=ta
jaiyaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ Uyarn=taperum pukaṭk kovirājakecari yeṉa
lākip perumeṇṭicaiyellā niṟain=ta kirtti Uṭaiyār śrī vijairāje
ntṛdevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 6 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ vaḷa nāṭṭup pā
mpūr nāṭṭu tirukkuṭamukkil mulaparuṭaiyom Ivvāṭṭai makaranāyaṟṟu
Aparapakṣattu dhiyaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Āyi[ le
ya] ttiṉ nāṉṟu ca caḷa .
ccāṟṟappuḷḷivācittut tirukkiḻk
koṭṭam muṭaiyār koyilil
Uḷḷālait tirumuṟṟattuk kūṭṭa
kkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiiruntu paṇi
p paṇiyālppaṇittu Iṟaiyi
lippiramāṇañceytu kuṭutta paricā
vatu tirukkāroṇamuṭaiya mahāde
varum kaṉṉiyāpiṭārikaḷum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟai
iṟukkakkaṭavai nilam Iṟai paṟṟumaiyil
Ittevarkaḷ ciri paṇṭāramāyak kūṭa Iruṉta �
kācukallāl niṟaipoṉ ṉānūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu Eṇkaḻañcu Ippo
ṉ ṉānūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu Eṇ kaḻaiñcaṅkoṇṭu tevarkaḷ
nilam [sa]paippotuvvāyk kālukku meṟkkum
ṉūṟṟu Irupatteṭṭukkuḻi koṇṭa toru māvāka vi lamum pu
nilam m paṇṇi koṇṭu tevar vi
ṭṭa nilattukku vaṭakku mutuvaṉ māyāṉ kāṭaṉum tampimārka nilattu
kku meṟku viḷainilam
ṉaṅkāṭṭukkuk kiḻakku coḻa Uttamavāykkālukku teṟkum mu
vāṟṟukku vaṭakku māṭalāṉa tiruvirāmiśvaraṉ naṉ ti nila
ttukku meṟkku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattil Ittevar tiru muṟṟamum
pū naṉtaṉavaṉaṅkaḷum nikki maramuṭaip puṉceykaḷum A
kaiyāṟu ka nilam ṉa
kkaṉ mahādevanuṉ tampimāru nilattukku vaṭakku vaḻi
kku teṟkku māṭilaṉ muttanakka ṉūrpaṇaṉ brāhmaṇi nila
ttukku teṟkkum kaviṇiyaṉ mahādevaṉ divākaranilattu
kku vaṭakkum vayiśravaṇṇavīśvaramuṭaiyā nero
yā viḷainilamum puṉceyum Akaiyāṟum toṭṭamu
m Āka ni m tirumukkāl va
ṭṭa muṭaiya māhādevar viṭṭa nilattukku teṟkum
maṟkkum � mākāṇi nākaṉ
kkuk kiḻakku toṭṭa ni
tirukkiḻkkoṭṭamuṭaiya māhādevarkku
paḷḷikoṇṭāḻvā
viṭṭa nilattukku vaṭakku
tiruvāyppāṭit tevaro
muṉṟopāti vanta toṭṭa
nilam
coḻa
teṟku viḷai nila
mum puṉceyum Ivvāykkālukkuva
ṭakku viḷainilamum Āka nilam m
kavuṇiyaṉ Āna mu
tukaṇavati yu caṉṉampi makanum kku
meṟkku paḻavāṟṟukku vaṭakkum viḷainila
m tāṉiyaṉā
kku Ēḻukaraikku vaṭakkut tāṇṭava
mahādevaroṭu nerpāti koṭit toṭṭa
nilam kulaiyātā
ṉ paḷḷivāykkālukkut teṟkku vi
ḷai nilamum puṉceyum Āka nilam
ṭā �ku
ḷ nilam vāyilārkuḷattukkum peruvaḻi
kum vaṭakku toṭṭa nilam m
m Ākappalataṭikaḷālum nūṟṟu Iru
pat teṭṭuk kuḻi koṇṭatoru mā �ka vanta
nilam m
Iṉṉilam Āṟaṉāye nākumākkāṇi
nāṉkumā mukkāṇi Āḷākkāṇi muntiri
kaikkiḻ Aṉāye mākāṇi Araikkāle
muntiri kaiyum cantirātitta
vaṟ Epperppaṭṭa Iṟai
yum veḷḷāṉ veṭṭi
yum Iṟaiyilikkāna Uḷ
ḷiṭṭu Eppeṟppaṭṭa Iṟai
kaḷum nāṅkaḷe Iṟuttukkuṭu
kka Ittevar Iṉṉilaṅkaḷi
liye Anubhavikkap vārā
Ipponkācu niṟai 3 100 9 10 3[6 100�] ṅ
koṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ Iṟaiyili cey
tu kuṭuttom tirukka roṇamuṭaiya mahāā
devaṟkkum kaṉṉiyar piṭārikaḷukkum
mulaparuṭaiyom Ipparicu Iṉṉilaṅka
ḷ cantirātittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyāka tirukkiḻ
koṭṭamuṭaiya mahādevar koyi
lille kallil veṭṭi vittukkuṭu
kkkaṭavomāka Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ Eppe
ṟppaṭṭa Iṟaiyumiḻicci Iṟaiyilip
piramāṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom ni
na kaāroṇamuṭaiya mahādevarkkum
kaṇyāpiṭārikaḷukkum mulaparuṭaiyom
mulaparuṭaiyil Iruntu paṇittār kaviṇiya
ṉ naṭuvilārāmutu nāyaṉeṉ kaviṇiyaṉ
nārāyaṇaṉ kaviṇiyaṉ jātavetaṉutittaṉ māṭa
ḷaṉā vain veṇkāṭu tevar māṭalaṉtevaṉ co
maṉ māṭalaṉ pāṇṭaṉ tāmotaraṉ kamutuva
ṉ māyāncomaṉ kamutuvaṉakkanākaṉ kamutuva
ṉ māyān comaṉ kamutuvaṉ mātevaṉ caṅka
raṉ pāratāyaṉ vaṭukanakkaṉ kāmakkāṉi nārāyaṇaṉ
mātevaṉ kāmakkāṉi caṅkaraṉ koṟṟaṉ kāmakkā
ṉi pāṇṭaṉ kecavaṉ Ātriyaṉṉutittanuttaṉ
nārāyaṇaṉ vāsutevaṉ mokiliyaṉ nārāya
ṇaṉārāvamutu viyākkira pātaṉ Appirameyaṉ
ḷḷa kaviṇiyaṉ cāttan ṣapa vāraṉ kaviṇiyaṉ mātevan
caṅkaraṉ kaviṇiyaṉ vāsutevaṉ contaṉ
māṭala nārāyaṇa neyanaṉ kamutuvaṉ tāmotaraṉ caṅkaranā
rāyaṇan kāmakkāṇi Icalaṉ māyāṉ kāmakkāṇiIncomplete.nācaṉ cirākava
